concerns.text: Unresolved Methodology Concern: The spec retains the selection bias identified in the kickback. FR-002 states entries missing thermodynamic data are 'excluded from the thermodynamic model but retained for the composition-only baseline.' FR-004 and FR-005 define the comparison between these two models. This creates a non-comparable dataset split (Thermo model on subset A, Baseline on set A+B), violating the fair comparison requirement. The spec must mandate that the Baseline model is trained on the SAME subset of data as the Thermo model (i.e., only entries with valid thermodynamic data) to isolate the feature effect, or explicitly define an imputation strategy for missing thermodynamic data.
